## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing API/behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation (i18n)
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI/CD
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] I have updated `packages/shared` if API contracts changed
- [ ] I have updated translations if UI text changed
- [ ] No PII appears in logs or error messages
- [ ] Accessibility has been maintained (keyboard nav, screen reader labels)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior changed
